title: deschampsia gayana var. neuquenensis
intro: Deschampsia gayana var. neuquenensis, also known as Neuquen Needle Grass or Deschampsia, is a species of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Deschampsia gayana var. neuquenensis include its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea or decoction, and it is also used in herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
